zh.lifeSummary: 當Jane Bulstrode於1446年出生在英國維爾爾海斯波利時，她的父親Sir Thomas Bulstrode30歲，母親Elizabeth Norreys21歲。她於1472年與Sir Walter Hungerford 4th Baron Hungerford在英國薩默塞特格福德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1517年在英國薩默塞特格福德享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jane Bulstrode于1446年出生在英国維爾爾海斯波利时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Bulstrode30岁，母亲Elizabeth Norreys21岁。她于1472年与Sir Walter Hungerford 4th Baron Hungerford在英国薩默塞特格福德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1517年在英国薩默塞特格福德享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bulstrode
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Bolstridge
meanings: English (Midlands): variant of Bulstrode, a habitational name from Bulstrode in Buckinghamshire, meaning ‘bull marsh’ from Old English bula ‘bull’ + strōd ‘marshy land’.

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Jane Bulstrode was born in 1446, in Heytesbury, Wiltshire, England, her father, Sir Thomas Bulstrode, was 30 and her mother, Elizabeth Norreys, was 21. She married Sir Walter Hungerford 4th Baron Hungerford in 1472, in Hungerford, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1517, in Hungerford, Somerset, England, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jane Bulstrode est née en 1446, à Heytesbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Bulstrode, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Norreys, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Walter Hungerford 4th Baron Hungerford en 1472, à Hungerford, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1517, à Hungerford, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jane Bulstrode 1446 in Heytesbury, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Bulstrode 30 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Norreys 21. Sie hat 1472 in Hungerford, Somerset, England Sir Walter Hungerford 4th Baron Hungerford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1517 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Hungerford, Somerset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jane Bulstrode è nata il nel 1446 nel Heytesbury, Wiltshire, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Bulstrode, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Norreys, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Sir Walter Hungerford 4th Baron Hungerford nel 1472, nel Hungerford, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1517, nel Hungerford, Somerset, England, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jane Bulstrodeが1446年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアヘイテスブリーで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Bulstrodeは30歳，母Elizabeth Norreysは21歳であった。1472年にイギリスソメルセトハンジャーフォードでSir Walter Hungerford 4th Baron Hungerfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1517年にイギリスソメルセトハンジャーフォードで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jane Bulstrode(이)가 1446년 영국 윌츠히르 헤이츠버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Bulstrode(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Norreys(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1472년 영국 서머세트 헌그르퍼드에서 Sir Walter Hungerford 4th Baron Hungerford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1517년 영국 서머세트 헌그르퍼드에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jane Bulstrode nasceu em 1446, em Heytesbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Bulstrode, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Norreys, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Walter Hungerford 4th Baron Hungerford em 1472, em Hungerford, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1517, em Hungerford, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jane Bulstrode родилась в 1446 г. в местности хитсбури, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Bulstrode было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Norreys, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Walter Hungerford 4th Baron Hungerford в 1472 г. в местности хунгирфорд, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1517 г. в местности хунгирфорд, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jane Bulstrode nació en 1446, en Heytesbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Bulstrode, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Norreys, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Sir Walter Hungerford 4th Baron Hungerford en 1472, en Hungerford, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1517, en Hungerford, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 71 años.
